title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend
description: We are looking for an experienced Backend Engineer to join our platform team. You will work on building scalable microservices that power our global platform. Strong system design skills and experience with distributed systems required.
requirements: Strong database design skills (SQL and NoSQL)
Understanding of system design and scalability

title: Product Manager
description: Looking for a PM to lead our analytics platform. Own the product vision, roadmap, and work cross-functionally with engineering and design teams. Experience with B2B SaaS and data products preferred.
requirements: Experience with B2B SaaS or analytics products
Strong data analysis and SQL skills
User research and user testing experience

title: Data Scientist - Machine Learning
description: Join our ML team to build and deploy machine learning models. Work on challenging problems in NLP and recommendation systems. Collaborate with engineers to productionize models and drive business impact.
requirements: Strong Python skills and ML frameworks experience
Experience with NLP or computer vision
Understanding of statistics and experimental design

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We need an experienced DevOps engineer to lead our infrastructure team. Design and implement cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring systems. Take ownership of system reliability and performance.

title: Frontend Engineer - React
description: Looking for a talented Frontend Engineer passionate about building beautiful, performant web applications. Work with React and modern JavaScript to create engaging user experiences for millions of users.
